license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.4q5gvy6
title: RNA Isolation from Plant Tissue Protocol 4: CTAB-PVP-TRIzol Method

steps_raw.instruction: Grind tissue to a powder in liquid nitrogen.
Add 200 mg – 500 mg of ground tissue to 3.0 mL of pre-heated extraction buffer in a 5 ml tube.
Vortex the tube until the tissue is mixed with the buffer.
Incubate the tube at 65 °C for 00:30:00 , vortexing briefly ( 00:00:15 ) every 2–3 min during the incubation.
Aliquot the mixture into four 2 ml RNase free tubes, 1 mL in each tube.
Spin the tube at for 00:10:00 in a centrifuge. All of the insoluble matter should form a pellet at the bottom of the tube.
Pour the supernatant into a new 2 ml tube.
Add an equal volume of 24:1 chloroform:isoamyl alcohol to fill the tube.
Vortex tubes until the phases mix and appear cloudy.
Spin the tubes at for 00:10:00 in a centrifuge.
Transfer the upper aqueous phase to new 2 ml RNase free tubes.
Transfer the upper, aqueous phase to new 2 ml RNase free tubes.
Spin tubes at for 00:20:00 in a centrifuge and decant the supernatant, taking care not to lose the pellet.
Add 1 mL 75 % cooled ethanol to the pellet.
Spin the tube at maximum speed for 00:05:00 in a centrifuge.
Open cap and air-dry the pellet.
Add 30 µL RNase free water to dissolve the pellet.
Centrifuge at > for 00:10:00 .
Transfer the upper, aqueous phase to a new 2 ml RNase free tube.
Spin tubes at > for 00:20:00 at 4 °C in a centrifuge.
Decant the supernatant taking care not to lose the pellet.
Centrifuge at 4 °C for 00:05:00 at > .
Repeat steps 21 and 22 one more time. go to step #21
Open cap and air dry the pellet.
Add 10 µL – 30 µL RNase free water to dissolve the pellet.
Decant the supernatant carefully.
Repeat steps 14 and 15 one more time. go to step #14
Incubate at 20 °C for 00:05:00 .
Repeat steps 8 to 10 one more time. go to step #8
Add 1/3 volume of 10 Molarity (M) LiCl to each tube.
Mix and let stand at 4 °C for 06:00:00 – 08:00:00 or overnight to precipitate RNA.
Then add 300 µL TRIzol reagent and equal volume of chloroform to TRIzol reagent (Invitrogen).
Vortex vigorously and store at 20 °C for 00:05:00 .
Add 2 volumes of cooled 100% ethanol, 1/10 volume of NaAc and 2 µL of glycogen.
Mix and incubate at -20 °C for 02:00:00 .
Add 1 mL 75 % ethanol to the pellet.
Let tube stand at 20 °C for 00:03:00 .
Decant the liquid carefully, taking care not to lose the pellet.
Briefly centrifuge to collect the residual liquid and remove it with a pipette.
